origin.description: Hand-written contract seed locking the ADR 0012 extractor's --volume long-form (next-token) branch. C055 uses -v; this uses the --volume alias with a broad host root /root. The 60th corpus case.

humanExpectation.rationale: The bind is given via the --volume long-form alias with a separate next token '/root:/data'. The extractor's `arg === '--volume'` branch reads the next token as the spec; dockerVolumeHostSide splits the host side /root (broad) from container /data → files.broad-path (blocker) → BLOCK. Locks the --volume long-form path (complement to C055's -v short-form). thisCaseMustNeverBeSafe: true.
knownLimitations: Evidence value is host /root, never container /data.
